event: Still life sketch with bread loaves
description: A watercolor and pencil sketch depicting several loaves of braided bread (possibly challah) arranged on a blue and white patterned cloth or napkin. The warm golden-brown bread contrasts vividly with the bold blue decorative pattern of the fabric. The sketch is rendered with loose, confident brushstrokes, capturing the rich texture of the baked crusts. The artist's monogram appears at the lower right. The style is direct and painterly, characteristic of Konchalovsky's expressive still life studies.

_meta.title: Sketch of still life with bread
